title: chrysanthemum discoideum
intro: Chrysanthemum discoideum, also known as the Yellow-flowered Chrysanthemum or Garland Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum discoideum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Chrysanthemum discoideum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be consumed in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
